reason: The image depicts a man in what appears to be 17th-century attire, seated at a desk and writing. The room is lit by candlelight. However, the hanging light fixture is clearly an anachronism. The desk lamp hanging is an Edison-style light bulb which was not available in the 17th century. Also the pen he is holding looks like a modern pen. The man's clothing and the general aesthetic of the room seem plausible for the period, but the modern light fixture invalidates it as a historically accurate representation.
